Asked for a non smoking room both at booking and at check in......got a smoking room..... Smelled horrible...... They did not keep up the breakfast stuff...have stayed here for years on our travels from AR to GA...
The room was nasty and smelly! I requested one queen bed and got two twins. nasty parking lot as well as a messy lobby!!!!!!!! I wouldn't recommend this hotel to anyone!
Check your sheets before crawling in bed here! Worst hotel stay EVER! Yuck!
check your sheets before crawling in bed here! worst hotel stay ever! yuck!

Room was horrible, there was a stink bug problem. I also had bugs crawling on me in bed. I researched and they look like bed bugs. There was also a Steel Reserve 211 Malt Liquor drink in the dresser. Worst place I have ever stayed and I have traveled to 42 states
Looks nothing like the pictures on line, terrible hotel
The hotel was disgusting. The carpet was stained and the paint on the walls did not match. It smelled terrible and was musty and moldy.
Everything is terrible!!!

Terrible hotel service. I booked through hotels.com and when I got to the hotel, the guy at desk said that the rooms were sold out. Then when customer service called him for a refund, the guy was nowhere to be found. Terrible service. Will not go to this location again.

Hotel carino, vicino alla metro e al centro di torremolinos. Ottima base per escursioni e la spiaggia si raggiunge sia con la navetta gratuita che con una bella passeggiata per le vie centrali. Ottimo buffet sia a colazione che a cena!

Faux 4 toiles il vaut peine un 3, le site internet est trompeur on s'attend arriver dans un belle htel et la dception est grande en y arrivant. La chambre classique est horrible on a l'impression de loger dans un motel ( les matelas on s'y enfonce, trs mauvaise insonorisation) et la salle de bain celle d'une aire de repos. Le personnel au bar/restaurant incomptent et mal poli par contre la piscine rien redir toujours trs gentil et accueillant. Bi
Wifi was horrible I kept getting kicked off and losing my work. Had to go to Starbucks to do work on Internet.
Absolutely horrible WiFi!   30 minutes to download a 24mb file.  That should take about 30 seconds.
